description: Feature Flags System - Create packages/feature-flags/ with FeatureFlagService (boolean flags, percentage rollout, user-segment targeting), Prisma-backed store, server-core plugin, admin panel page with CRUD API routes, and Prisma schema additions.
steps: Create packages/feature-flags/package.json with @quant/feature-flags name, dependencies on @quant/database, @quant/common, zod. Include build/typecheck/test/lint scripts.
Create packages/feature-flags/tsconfig.json extending root tsconfig pattern
Create packages/feature-flags/src/types.ts - Flag, FlagContext, FlagRule, FlagVariant, RolloutStrategy types

Create packages/feature-flags/src/flag-service.ts - FeatureFlagService class with methods: isEnabled(flagName, context?), getVariant(flagName, context?), getAllFlags(), createFlag(), updateFlag(), deleteFlag(). Support boolean, percentage rollout (hash userId % 100 < percentage), user-segment targeting (check context against rules).
Create packages/feature-flags/src/flags-store.ts - PrismaFlagStore: load flags from DB, cache in-memory with TTL (30s refresh), CRUD operations
Create packages/feature-flags/src/index.ts - export all public API

Add FeatureFlag model to packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma with fields: id, name (unique), description, enabled, rules (Json), percentage (Int), variants (Json), createdAt, updatedAt. Add @@map('feature_flags')

Create packages/server-core/src/plugins/feature-flags.ts - fastify-plugin that decorates fastify.flags with isEnabled/getVariant. Loads flags on startup, refreshes every 30s. Registers flag service on fastify instance.
Export the new plugin from packages/server-core/src/index.ts
Create apps/admin/src/app/feature-flags/page.tsx - List all flags with toggle switch, percentage slider, targeting rules editor. Use Card/Badge/Button from @quant/shared-ui.
Create apps/admin/src/app/api/feature-flags/route.ts - GET (list all), POST (create new flag) handlers
Create packages/feature-flags/src/__tests__/flag-service.test.ts - unit tests covering: boolean check, percentage rollout (deterministic hash), segment targeting, getAllFlags, create/update/delete
acceptance_criteria: FeatureFlagService.isEnabled returns boolean based on flag state and context
Percentage rollout uses deterministic hashing (same userId always gets same result)
Prisma schema has FeatureFlag model with all specified fields
Admin page renders flag list with toggle controls
API routes handle GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for feature flags
pnpm turbo typecheck passes across entire monorepo
findings: All verification passed: 136 typecheck tasks, 109 build tasks, 137 test tasks all green. 19 unit tests for feature-flags pass. Prettier reformatted files during lint-staged. Used z.input<typeof Schema> for createFlag/updateFlag method params to allow partial input (zod .default() makes output type required but input type optional). Removed unused imports (CreateFlagInput/UpdateFlagInput from flags-store.ts, FlagContext from plugin).
